title_original: China’s first homegrown quantum computing operating system available for online download - Global Times
summary_original: China’s first domestically developed quantum computer operating system, Origin Pilot, created by Hefei-based Origin Quantum Computing Technology, is now available for online download, according to the Anhui Quantum Computing Engineering Research Center. Described as the world’s first open-source, publicly downloadable quantum operating system, Origin Pilot supports major hardware types, including superconducting qubits, trapped ions, and neutral atoms. Chief scientist Guo Guoping said this release marks a shift from closed innovation to open-source ecosystem development in China’s quantum industry. The system includes features such as automatic qubit calibration and parallel quantum task execution, aiming to lower technical barriers and support research and commercialization. Unlike other major firms, Origin Pilot can be locally downloaded and used beyond cloud-based access.
